openQuestions: Whether the LLM-judge semantic score beats the form-only quality_score over the existing [0.9,1.1] multiplier (needs a prod-mode completeRecall@3 read; inherited C2 gate)
The precision/recall of an entailment-based contradiction detector on graph-nominated candidate pairs (needs a build-stage measurement)
The corpus-wide count of mixed-embedding-regime chunks (the drift monitor's Stage-0 census; deferred to a build)

keyFindings.finding: Context-budget optimizer splits in two: a score-changing variant is the qualityScore reranker (NO-GO as novel, C2-gated), but a budget-fitting ASSEMBLER at the envelope layer is genuinely novel, refines top-3 density/diversity AFTER the floor with no re-index, and wins on context density not recall.

LLM-judge is a better INPUT to the shipped [0.9,1.1] qualityScore multiplier, not a new lane; honest governance value, ±10% retrieval ceiling, C2-gated for ranking. answerable_questions/semantic_intent have no live consumer so auto-gen is a dropped no-op until a fusion consumer is built.

Retrieval-driven AUTO-rewriting of authored bodies is NO-GO (re-derived adversarially): mutates the source of truth to chase a proxy, reward-hacks the embedding, unprovable per-change, crosses the no-body-mutate rail. Suggest-only human-gated diff is the salvageable GO-on-cost core.

A rule-based entity extractor already ships (SPECKIT_AUTO_ENTITIES); KG-from-content is half-built. Novel delta is LLM TYPED RELATIONS as an L/navigation surface (GO-on-cost), not a ranking lane. Auto-summarization rollup nodes = the already-rejected new-node-type + an infidelity multiplier on the parent's net-negative seam (NO-GO).
keyFindings.evidence: lib/extraction/entity-extractor.ts; entity-linker.ts; handlers/causal-graph.ts; parent rollup net-negative

keyFindings.finding: Cross-doc contradiction + staleness detection is the lineage HEADLINE novel capability: a clean floor-bypass serving the logic-consistency reader nothing in the reuse-first program touches. Candidate pairs nominated by the shipped entity catalog + causal graph (not all-pairs), LLM-entailment-scored, report-only. Freshness decay auto-refresh is a thin queue on the shipped FSRS retrievability.

Embedding-drift monitoring + alerting is the MIXED-VECTOR guard the reuse-first re-index path (parent Stage 5) needs: per-chunk embedding_context_version + model/normalizer fingerprint, alert on mixed-regime, protects every prod@3 read. Automatic example/test generation from specs is the strongest ADHERENCE lever in the topic, additive + human-approved so it dodges the auto-rewrite rail.
keyFindings.evidence: grep embedding-drift|generateTest=EMPTY; vector-index-schema.ts:771-785; parent Stage 5; reuse-first A7

keyFindings.finding: Doc-quality leaderboard/dashboard is the least-novel item: a presentation of existing signals redundant with the B1 sweep report (NO-GO, fold in). Per-doc quality SLAs are a thin GO-on-cost binding: a target field on the description.json governance block + a breach-files-a-report-only-queue-item rule reusing the KQ5/B3 queue.

Adversarial convergence: every genuinely-novel GO is a FLOOR-BYPASSER; not one novel candidate recovers floor-cut recall. The candidates that try (auto-rewrite, score-changing budget optimizer, auto-summarization rollup) are exactly the NO-GOs. The two rails survived independent adversarial re-derivation. The novel program is a CORRECTNESS+ADHERENCE program (consistency, integrity, concreteness, density), the axis the reuse-first retrieval program left open.
keyFindings.evidence: iters 001-007; parent truncation law + two rails

ruledOutDirections.reason: it is the qualityScore reranker, retrieval-class, C2-gated, not novel
reward-hacks a proxy on the source of truth; crosses the no-body-mutate rail; unprovable per-change
rejected new-node-type + LLM infidelity on the parent's one net-negative seam

ruledOutDirections.approach: Auto-gen answerable_questions without building a fusion consumer
ruledOutDirections.reason: dropped no-op on disk (the 028 silent-drop trap)
duplicates the shipped entity catalog + causal graph; self-referential community cycle
O(n^2) LLM passes, intractable and noisy; gate by graph-nominated pairs
flags paraphrase not contradiction; needs an entailment/negation signal
presentation of existing signals, redundant with the B1 sweep report + DQI
crosses the no-body-mutate rail; a breach files a report-only item only

ruledOutDirections.approach: Any novel idea beating the truncation floor on recall
ruledOutDirections.reason: none does; the law is airtight against out-of-the-box framing too
